excellent.label: Excellent
excellent.description: An excellent execution of the phase or overall shot.

good.label: Good
good.description: A sound execution of the phase or overall shot with only minor opportunities for improvement.

needs_work.label: Needs Work
needs_work.description: The phase or overall shot contains one or more technical aspects requiring coaching attention.

red_flag.label: Red Flag
red_flag.description: A significant technical issue requiring immediate coaching attention.

unclear.label: Unclear
unclear.description: The quality of the phase or overall shot cannot be judged reliably from the available evidence.
